[ID: SCENE_07.2_THE_THRESHOLD]

[Technical Header]:
85mm medium close-up, 24fps, #3FA7D6 cold rim light raking from frame-left — single source, zero fill; sterile night-stairwell atmosphere; interior: bare concrete landing.

[Subject/Asset]:
[ANCHOR POINT] Pale crescent scar along the LEFT jaw, half-inch, aged to white. [CRITICAL] Set jaw, controlled resolve, no tremor. Male figure held at frame-left, squared to the numbered door, gaze locked on the lock plate. He grips the [Asset: Brass_Key] in his RIGHT hand, raised to chest height, exactly as the previous shard left it.

[Action/State]:
Hero rotates the [Asset: Brass_Key] in his RIGHT hand and extends it toward the lock plate in one controlled motion — no hesitation, gaze unbroken. The key meets the lock as the shard closes.

[Environment/Lighting]:
Primary: #3FA7D6 cold rim light, single source raking from frame-left across the jawline; no secondary source, no fill. The unlit half of the frame falls to a flat #0B0E14 void — zero gradient. Bare concrete landing compresses to a cold ground; the numbered door sits at the vanishing point.

[Temporal Constraint]:
5 seconds. Slow locked push-in, zero breath. Shot ends with the [Asset: Brass_Key] at the lock, Hero at frame-left, scar-side jaw catching the #3FA7D6 rim, gaze still fixed — positioned for the turn.
